frontpage.title: Reclaim your life without back pain
frontpage.description: Specialized Spine Surgery, Herniated Disc, Sciatica, Scoliosis, Fractures or Accidents, Biopsy Taking, among many other services.

minInv.title: Minimally Invasive Surgery
minInv.description: Minimally invasive surgery allows treatment of musculoskeletal conditions through small incisions, reducing tissue damage and speeding up patient recovery.

disc.title: Herniated Disc
disc.description: A herniated disc occurs when one of the spinal discs shifts and presses on nearby nerves, causing pain and limiting movement. It is one of the most common causes of lower back and neck pain.
disc.symptom2: Pain radiating to arms or legs
disc.ctaText: Early diagnosis can prevent complications and improve your quality of life.
disc.imageAlt: Illustration of a herniated disc in the spine

scoliosis.title: Scoliosis
scoliosis.description: Scoliosis is an abnormal curvature of the spine that can develop during growth or appear in adulthood. In some cases, it may progress and cause discomfort or affect posture.
scoliosis.ctaText: Early diagnosis allows proper treatment and prevents progression.
scoliosis.imageAlt: Example of scoliosis in the spine

osteo.title: Osteoarthritis
osteo.description: Osteoarthritis is a degenerative joint disease that occurs when cartilage wears down over time, causing pain, stiffness, and reduced mobility.
osteo.ctaText: Proper treatment can relieve symptoms and significantly improve quality of life.
osteo.imageAlt: Representation of a joint affected by osteoarthritis

sciatica.title: Sciatica / Sciatic Nerve
sciatica.description: Sciatica is pain caused by irritation or compression of the sciatic nerve, the longest nerve in the body. It usually starts in the lower back and may radiate down the leg.
sciatica.symptom1: Lower back pain radiating to buttock and leg
sciatica.symptom3: Weakness when walking or moving the leg
sciatica.ctaText: Early treatment can relieve pain and prevent complications.
sciatica.imageAlt: Representation of an inflamed sciatic nerve

procedures.title: Explore Procedures
procedures.exploreInjuriesFor: Explore injuries and treatments for the {{part}}

about.name: Dr. Hans Ruiz
about.description:
Hi there, I am Dr. Hans Ruiz Serna, I have experience in the management of sciatic, lumbar, and cervical pain using minimally invasive techniques, as well as in surgical procedures for joint prosthetics and spinal surgery.
Since 2014, I have dedicated myself to performing fracture repair surgeries, joint replacements, and comprehensive management of musculoskeletal injuries, offering precise, humane medical care focused on restoring my patients' mobility and quality of life.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Dr. Hans Ruiz, located in Tijuana, Baja California, Mexico, is committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect the information you provide through our website

section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
text: We collect personal information such as your name, email address, and phone number when you fill out our contact, information request, or appointment forms.
Additionally, during in-person medical care, information related to your consultation, medical records, and clinical documentation may be generated in accordance with applicable laws.

section2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
items: To schedule medical appointments or consultations.
To communicate regarding medical services, procedures, and follow-up care.
To create and manage medical records.
To provide information requested by you.
To improve the accuracy and documentation of the medical care provided.

During medical consultations, technological clinical support tools may be used, including voice processing and transcription, for the purpose of documenting medical information and facilitating the integration of medical records.

section3.title: 3. Video Surveillance and Clinical Support Tools
text: The clinic facilities may use video surveillance systems for security purposes, protection of patients and medical staff, access control, and incident management.

Additionally, digital clinical support and medical documentation tools may be used during consultations. The information obtained will be considered confidential and handled in accordance with applicable regulations regarding personal and sensitive personal data protection.

section4.title: 4. Data Protection
text: We implement administrative, physical, and technical safeguards to ensure your data is protected against unauthorized access, disclosure, loss, or misuse.
Access to medical information and personal data will be restricted exclusively to authorized personnel and handled under strict confidentiality measures.

section5.title: 5. Data Sharing
text: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties, except when necessary for technological services related to clinic operations and clinical documentation.
We may also share information when required by law or when expressly authorized by the data owner.

section6.title: 6. Your Rights
section6.text1: You may request access, correction, updating, cancellation, or objection regarding the processing of your personal data (ARCO Rights) by contacting us at

section7.title: 7. International Users
section7.text: By using this website, you understand that your information may be transferred to and processed in Mexico, where our medical office is located.

section8.title: 8. Updates
section8.text: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. Any changes will be reflected on this page together with the updated revision date.
